description_long: This is a matte black kettle with a cylindrical body and two side-mounted handles, designed for easy lifting and pouring. The kettle features a flat removable lid with a prominent round knob, which is slightly tilted open in the images. The handles are robust and ergonomically shaped, extending horizontally from each side of the kettle. The base is flat, providing stability when placed on surfaces such as stovetops or countertops. The exterior is plain, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of metal, likely aluminum or steel, with plastic or composite handles and lid knob for heat resistance.
description: A matte black, cylindrical kettle with two side handles and a flat removable lid with a round knob. The design is plain and modern, with a sturdy, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both side handles and the flat lid slightly open with a round knob.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting one handle and the open lid, with the knob clearly visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing both handles and the lid's knob, with the lid partially open.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the handle and the round knob on the lid, with the lid mostly covering the opening.
